nasb.text: All these were sons of Jediael, according to the heads of their fathers’ households, 17,200 mighty men of valor, who were ready to go out with the army to war.

esv.text: All these were the sons of Jediael according to the heads of their fathers’ houses, mighty warriors, 17,200, able to go to war.

cnv.text: 這都是耶疊的兒子，是各家族的首領，是英勇的戰士，能上陣作戰的，共有一萬七千二百人。

ccb.text: 这些耶叠的儿子都是族长，宗族中可以英勇作战的共一万七千二百人。
